chunks.text: Intro live from Nvidia GTC, setting up a run of back-to-back conversations about the future of AI infrastructure, applications, and compute economics.

chunks.speaker: Michael Intrator
chunks.text: The CoreWeave segment focuses on GPU demand, infrastructure bottlenecks, hyperscaler relationships, and what customers actually need from next-generation AI capacity.

chunks.speaker: Aravind Srinivas
chunks.text: The Perplexity conversation centers on search behavior, answer engines, consumer habits, and how AI interfaces might change discovery on the web.

chunks.speaker: Arthur Mensch
chunks.text: The Mistral section turns toward open-weight models, European AI strategy, and how teams can compete with much larger labs by staying focused.

chunks.speaker: Daniel Roberts
chunks.text: The IREN interview digs into datacenters, power, site selection, and why energy access is becoming one of the hardest constraints in AI expansion.
